name: components/button-group
description: A container that groups related buttons or inputs together with shared borders and rounded corners, eliminating double borders between adjacent items. Supports horizontal and vertical orientations and automatically coordinates focus rings and separator styling. Composed of ButtonGroup, ButtonText, and ButtonSeparator primitives.
useCases: Pagination controls grouped as Previous, page numbers, and Next buttons
Formatting toolbars in rich-text editors to group Bold, Italic, and Underline toggles
Split buttons where a primary action sits next to a dropdown trigger
Input-button combinations such as a search field with a submit button
